'''pajara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xwind|xwind]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-j-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xwind|xwind]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pajara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæjæræth|pæjæræth]] || [[word:pæjæræj|pæjæræj]] || [[word:pæjæræsh|pæjæræsh]] || [[word:pæjæræ|pæjæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pajajarath|pajajarath]] || [[word:pajajaraj|pajajaraj]] || [[word:pajajarash|pajajarash]] || [[word:pajajara|pajajara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pajarath|pajarath]] || [[word:pajaraj|pajaraj]] || [[word:pajarash|pajarash]] || [[word:pajara|pajara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pajafrath|pajafrath]] || [[word:pajafraj|pajafraj]] || [[word:pajafrash|pajafrash]] || [[word:pajafraf|pajafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pajaratha|pajaratha]] || [[word:pajaraja|pajaraja]] || [[word:pajarasha|pajarasha]] || [[word:pajaraka|pajaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pajarath|pajarath]] || [[word:pajaraj|pajaraj]] || [[word:pajarash|pajarash]] || [[word:pajara|pajara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pajarathal|pajarathal]] || [[word:pajarajal|pajarajal]] || [[word:pajarashal|pajarashal]] || [[word:pajarakal|pajarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pajarathatha|pajarathatha]] || [[word:pajarajaja|pajarajaja]] || [[word:pajarashasha|pajarashasha]] || [[word:pajaraka|pajaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pajarathan|pajarathan]] || [[word:pajarajan|pajarajan]] || [[word:pajarashan|pajarashan]] || [[word:pajarakan|pajarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pajarathaoro|pajarathaoro]] || [[word:pajarajaoro|pajarajaoro]] || [[word:pajarashaoro|pajarashaoro]] || [[word:pajarakaoro|pajarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
